00],[356,613,1776529661629],[355,613,1776529661635],[354,613,1776529661668],[353,612,1776529661697],[353,612,1776529662079],[353,611,1776529662095],[351,606,1776529662111],[346,595,1776529662125],[338,581,1776529662136],[329,565,1776529662148],[320,551,1776529662161],[314,541,1776529662171],[311,537,1776529662189],[310,536,1776529662204],[310,536,1776529662221],[311,536,1776529662237],[312,536,1776529662249],[312,537,1776529662257],[313,537,1776529662285],[314,537,1776529662295],[315,537,1776529662315],[316,538,1776529662340],[316,538,1776529662353],[315,538,1776529662362],[314,538,1776529662373],[313,538,1776529662398],[313,539,1776529662404],[312,539,1776529662419],[311,539,1776529662440],[310,539,1776529662460],[309,539,1776529662466],[310,539,1776529662501],[311,539,1776529662539],[312,540,1776529662554],[313,540,1776529662578]],"mm-mp":18.862457722660654,"md":[[316,539,1776529662345]],"md-mp":3688.0,"mu":[[316,539,1776529662486]],"mu-mp":3706.0},"v":1,"tc":{}}
